name: speedshop
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail && mise trust --yes /workspaces/speedshop/mise.toml && mise install ruby && mise install --locked node python pandoc terraform awscli && mise exec -- npm ci && mise exec -- bash -lc "bundle install --jobs 4 --retry 3" && mise exec -- npx --no-install playwright install chromium'
